records.title: TRAMPOLINe project scope: industrial adoption of microbial electrochemical technologies
records.summary: TRAMPOLINe is a Horizon Europe MSCA Doctoral Network coordinated by UAB around industrial adoption of microbial electrochemical technologies.
records.provenanceNote: Curated ecosystem context only. Do not use as validated MFC/MEC stack-performance evidence.

claims.content: TRAMPOLINe is useful for METREV as industrial-adoption vocabulary and ecosystem context, not as validated reactor-performance evidence.
The project framing supports METREV's decision-support focus on translation, comparability, integration, scale-up, and adoption barriers.

records.title: TRAMPOLINe work-package lens mapped to METREV evidence ontology
records.summary: TRAMPOLINe work-package themes map naturally to METREV layers: microbiology, redox/reactor engineering, materials, industrial bioproduction, environmental applications, and adoption.
records.provenanceNote: Curated ontology mapping from public TRAMPOLINe descriptions. It is an adoption-taxonomy anchor, not experimental evidence.

claims.content: TRAMPOLINe's work-package structure can be used as a METREV evidence-map lens across biology, reactors, materials, applications, and adoption.
Project work-package labels should not override canonical METREV domain or contract vocabulary.

records.title: TRAMPOLINe DC5-style electrode-materials evidence map target
records.summary: Next-generation electrode materials are a high-value METREV evidence-map target because material choice affects performance, durability, procurement, and scale-up comparability.
records.provenanceNote: Curated topic map for electrode-material evidence collection.

claims.content: Electrode material claims should preserve material family, modification, geometry, loading, durability, source span, and operating context.
Material evidence is weak for procurement decisions unless durability, fouling, cost, and scale context are present.

records.title: TRAMPOLINe DC7-style NH3 and energy recovery evidence map target
records.summary: NH3 and energy recovery from wastewater is a priority evidence-map target for resource-recovery MEC and broader MET decision support.
records.provenanceNote: Curated topic map for nutrient and energy recovery evidence collection.

claims.content: NH3 recovery evidence should preserve feed matrix, recovery efficiency, energy input, current efficiency, pH, conductivity, and product concentration.
Resource-recovery recommendations should lower confidence when recovery objective, selectivity, or energy input is missing.

records.title: TRAMPOLINe DC10-style hydrogen prototype scale-up evidence map target
records.summary: Upscaled MEC hydrogen production is a priority evidence-map target for modeling, gas handling, safety, benchmark, and technoeconomic readiness.
records.provenanceNote: Curated topic map for MEC hydrogen scale-up evidence collection.

claims.content: MEC hydrogen scale-up evidence should preserve reactor volume, current density, hydrogen rate, gas purity, energy input, and operation duration.
Hydrogen recommendations should expose gas-side observability, safety, purity validation, and long-startup uncertainty.

records.title: A Strategic Digital Transformation for the Water Industry
records.summary: IWA digital-water reference framing data-driven decision support, data governance, veracity, and metadata as necessary for confident water-sector decisions.
records.provenanceNote: Curated metadata reference. Import the local PDF for full source chunks before extraction-heavy use.

claims.content: Digital water decision support requires governance, metadata, and data-quality visibility before confidence can be justified.
Big-data value in water systems depends on veracity and variety, not only volume and velocity.

records.title: Metadata for a systematic description of signal data
records.summary: This metadata chapter organizes signal metadata into signal generation, signal quality, and contextual annotations, with basic, advanced, and future-proof priorities.
records.provenanceNote: Curated metadata reference. Import the local PDF for chunk-level extraction and page locators.

claims.content: Signal-data metadata should distinguish signal generation, signal quality, and contextual annotations.
Metadata priority should separate basic, advanced, and future-proof information so missing fields can be interpreted by use case.

records.title: El valor de los metadatos para las estaciones de recuperación de recursos del agua
records.summary: Spanish-language metadata article emphasizing metadata as the ingredient that turns water-resource-recovery data graveyards into usable decision resources.
records.provenanceNote: Curated metadata reference. Import the local PDF for Spanish chunk-level extraction and page locators.

claims.content: Metadata are essential to convert raw water-resource-recovery data into useful information and decision resources.
Without descriptive metadata, large water-sector datasets risk becoming data graveyards rather than reusable evidence assets.
